title: MIMS HOUSE FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: NAACP EUGENE-SPRINGFIELD MIMS HOUSE FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food box home delivery for community members. 330 High Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted; must live within a 10 mile radius of the food pantry Hours: Office: Tuesday-Friday 11am-1pm Delivery: Tuesday-Friday noon-1:30pm; submit form to request a delivery day Email (541) 484-1119 , Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 484-1119 Sarah, Office Manager Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete the Community Needs Form to request a food box FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Eugene Downtown Bus Station is one block away from the office Services: Grocery Ordering/Delivery Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NAACP EUGENE-SPRINGFIELD
